exploration_notes: Identified all key reference files needed to implement the PolicyQuotaController. The implementation requires: (1) pkg/policy/k8s/cell.go and watcher.go as primary patterns for hive-based controller with resource.Resource[T] event watching — the cell.go shows how to define a cell.Module, use cell.In for DI params, register lifecycle hooks, and subscribe to resource events; watcher.go shows the event loop pattern with select over Events() channels, handling Sync/Upsert/Delete EventKinds and calli
